creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you please report this issue upstream as the error message you
got indicated?  http://gcc.gnu.org/bugs.html

It may be interesting for you to give the lang/gcc7 port a try (or
the current development development snapshot for the for GCC 8 which
we provide as lang/gcc8-devel) to see whether newer versions of GCC
also exhibit this behavior on your system.

If you need help with the upstream report, for example since you have
all information together, but do not want to use GCC Bugzilla, say, I
can serve as a proxy if you provide me said information (which includes
preprocessed sources and a direction invocation of g++ that reproduces
the issue).
